common.notMedicalAdvice: Ehara tēnei i te whakakapi mō te tohutohu hauora ngaio. Tēnā koa kōrero ki tō tīma hauora.
common.sovereignData: Ka noho tō raraunga ki Aotearoa
common.error: He hapa kē tēnei. Ngana anō.
common.errorContact: Mēnā ka haere tonu tēnei, whakapā atu ki tō rōpū tiaki hauora.
common.culturalSafety: Kua hangaia tēnei papaaho i runga i ngā mātāpono o Te Tiriti o Waitangi me te haumaru ahurea.

navigation.skipToContent: Tere atu ki ngā ihirangi matua

home.heroTitle: Tautoko mō ngā whānau o ngā pēpi whakamua
home.heroSubtitle: He tūmataiti. He haumaru ahurea. He mea hanga mō Aotearoa.
home.heroDescription: He papatono motuhake, tūmataiti-tuatahi hei hono i ngā whānau o ngā pēpi matua ki ngā ratonga, ki ngā mōhiotanga, ki ētahi atu — puta noa i Aotearoa.
home.intro: He papaaho tūmataiti hei āwhina i ngā whānau ki te whakatere i ngā ratonga me ngā mōhiohio i runga i te mana me te atawhai.

roleSelector.title: Nau mai, haere mai — Tūtaki
roleSelector.subtitle: Hei tautoko i ngā whānau o ngā pēpi matua puta noa i Aotearoa
roleSelector.parentDescription: Kimihia he tautoko, he mōhiotanga, he arahi mō tō haerenga
roleSelector.practitionerDescription: Uru atu ki ngā taputapu, ngā rauemi, me te whakahaere rārangi
roleSelector.choosePortal: Kōwhiria tō whatunga ki te haere tonu

features.title: I hangaia mō te whānau, e the whānau
features.subtitle: I hoahoa ia āhuatanga me te haumaru ahurea me te tūmataiti i roto i tōna ngākau.
features.privacyDescription: Kāore tō raraunga e rere ana i Aotearoa. He whiriwhiri-mutunga me tō mana whakahaere.
features.directoryDescription: Kimihia ngā ratonga, ngā rōpū tautoko, me ngā tohunga i ngā wāhi katoa o Aotearoa.
features.culturalDescription: I hoahoa tahi me ōna mō ngā whānau Māori. Ngā tikanga e hāngai ana ki Te Tiriti o Waitangi i ngā wāhi katoa.
features.supportDescription: Hono atu ki ētahi atu whānau e mārama ana ki te haerenga o ngā pēpi matua.
features.guidesDescription: He mōhiotanga i āta kōwhiria, i reo māmā, i arotakehia e ngā kaitiaki hauora me ngā whānau.
features.aiDescription: He kaiārahi AI māmā hei āwhina i te whakatere mōhiotanga — he mārama tonu, ehara i te whakakapi mō tō rōpū tiaki.

values.title: Ō mātou tū
values.subtitle: Ko tō mātou kaupapa e ārahi ana i ia whakatau e mahia ana.
values.manaDescription: E tū ana ki te mana motuhake me te rangatiratanga o te whānau i ia whakawhitinga.
values.whanauDescription: Ka tautokohia te whānau katoa — kaua ko te tūroro anake. Ko ngā tuākana, ko ngā hoa rangatira, ko ngā koro, ko ngā kuia hoki.
values.tikaDescription: He mōhiotanga tōtika, tika, e hāngai ana ki te ahurea — i ngā wā koa.
values.manaakiDescription: He tiaki pono me te manaaki i ia āhuatanga, i ia kupu, i ia whakawhitinga.

directory.title: Rārangi ā-Motu
directory.subtitle: Ngā ratonga me te tautoko puta noa i Aotearoa
directory.searchPlaceholder: Rapua ngā ratonga, ngā whakahaere rānei...
directory.noResults: Kāore he hua i kitea. Whakamātauria te whakawhānui i tō rapunga.
directory.noResultsSuggestion: Ngana ki te whakawhanui i tō rapu, tīpakohia rānei he rohe kē atu.

resources.title: Ngā Rauemi me ngā Arataki
resources.searchPlaceholder: Rapua ngā arataki me ngā rauemi...

parent.welcome: Nau mai ki tō whatunga whānau
parent.subtitle: Tō wāhi mataora mō te tautoko, mō ngā mōhiotanga, me te hono.

practitioner.subtitle: Ngā taputapu me ngā rauemi mō ngā kaimahi hauora ngaio me ngā whakahaere tautoko.

privacy.title: Tūmataiti me te Rangatiratanga o ngā Raraunga
privacy.description: Kei a koe te mana o ō raraunga. E whai ana mātou i ngā mātāpono o Te Mana Raraunga me te Ture Tūmataiti o Aotearoa.
privacy.encryption: Kei te whakamuna ngā tuhinga, ā, kei te tiakina pai.

consent.title: Whakaae me te Tiri
consent.subtitle: Kei a koe te mana o ō mōhiohio. Arotakehia, hurihia hoki ō hiahia i ngā wā katoa.
consent.manage: Whakahaerehia ko wai ka āhei ki te kite i ō mōhiohio
consent.analyticsDescription: Āwhina mai i a mātou ki te whakapai ake i te papatono mā te tohatoha raraunga whakamahi kore-ingoa. Kāore he mōhiohio whaiaro e kohia ana.
consent.supportDescription: Tukua mātou ki te tūtohu i ngā hononga ki ētahi atu whānau i ngā āhuatanga ōrite.
consent.disclaimer: Ka taea e koe te huri i tō āheitanga i ngā wā katoa. Ko te huri i tō āheitanga kāore e pā ana ki ngā ratonga kua riro ke.

errors.somethingWrong: I puta he hapa. Tēnā koa ngana anō.
errors.unauthorized: Kāore i a koe te mana ki te uru ki tēnei.
errors.pageDescription: Kua rēhia mātou i te take, ka titiro ake.
errors.notFoundDescription: Pea kua neke, kua tangohia rānei tēnei whārangi. Ki te hiahia āwhina, whakapā atu ki tō rōpū tiaki tūturu.
errors.serverTitle: Kāore e waatea ana te ratonga
errors.serverDescription: He raruraru āpōpō tōna roa. Ngana anō ā tōna wā.

footer.tagline: Tautoko i ngā whānau puta noa i Aotearoa
footer.notMedicalAdvice: Ehara tēnei papatono i te whakakapi mō te tohutohu hauora ngaio.
footer.acknowledgement: E mihi ana mātou ki ngā tangata whenua o Aotearoa, ā, e ū tonu ana ki ngā mātāpono o Te Tiriti o Waitangi.
footer.copyright: Front Line Whānau. I hangaia me te aroha i Aotearoa.
